name: binanceus boundary puncture

phase_0.boundary_condition: the closed cryptographic perimeter containing the centralized exchange and its immutable ledger

VINIT.justification: Genesis of the exchange perimeter from the uninitialized network void before any state is named.

TANCH.justification: The closed cryptographic perimeter that contains the entire exchange system and seals the ledger.

AFWD.justification: Forward morphism directing the incoming transaction stream toward the validation gates.

AREV.justification: Reverse morphism descending into traffic quarantine and rejection of unauthorized packets.

CLINK.justification: Sequential composition of validated transactions through the matching engine and logging subsystems.

IMSCRIB.justification: The self referential perimeter observing its own state space and writing its own boundary conditions.

FSPLIT.justification: The validation gates splitting the incoming transaction stream into authorized and unauthorized branches.

FFUSE.justification: The reconciliation engine reconstituting the authorized and unauthorized branches into the unified transaction record.

EVALT.justification: Affirmative evaluation anchoring the branch of transactions that pass cryptographic and balance checks.

EVALF.justification: Negative evaluation anchoring the branch of transactions that fail validation and are dropped.

ENGAGR.justification: The paradice of the boundary puncture holding global network entanglement and Z2 binary parity protection simultaneously.

IFIX.justification: Permanent append only fixation of executed trades and blocked attempts into the cryptographic audit trail.

phase_3.void_description: uninitialized network state before the exchange perimeter is instantiated
phase_3.true_description: authorized transaction state passing all validation gates
phase_3.false_description: unauthorized transaction state rejected by validation gates
phase_3.both_description: the paradice of a punctured boundary where global entanglement and binary parity protection are held simultaneously

steps.domain_action: Genesis of the exchange perimeter from the uninitialized network void.
Establishment of the closed cryptographic boundary containing the exchange.
The perimeter achieves self referential topology, observing its own state space.
Forward morphism routing the incoming transaction stream toward the validation gates.
Validation gates bifurcate the transaction stream into authorized and unauthorized branches.
Affirmative evaluation anchoring the authorized transaction branch.
Sequential composition of authorized transactions through the matching engine.
Permanent append only fixation of the executed trades into the immutable ledger.
Negative evaluation anchoring the unauthorized transaction branch.
Reverse morphism descending into egress denial and traffic quarantine.
Sequential composition of the rejection event through the security logging subsystem.
Permanent append only fixation of the blocked attempts into the audit trail.
Post incident reconciliation fusing the authorized and unauthorized branches into the complete transaction stream.
The paradice of the boundary puncture, holding global entanglement and Z2 binary parity protection simultaneously without resolution.
Terminal anchor sealing the unified ledger and closing the perimeter cycle.

phase_5.compiler_frontend: cryptographic protocol translator converting user intents into signed transactions
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: WebSocket and REST API channels routing messages across the perimeter
phase_5.memory_mechanism: in memory order book and persistent relational databases for state storage
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: matching engine event loop determining transaction execution order
phase_5.alfs_store: the genesis block and canonical blockchain ledger serving as the bootstrap store

phase_6.cycle_cost: computational proof of work and network bandwidth consumed per validation cycle
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: unvalidated incoming transaction stream at the perimeter edge
phase_6.post_cycle_state: reconstituted transaction batch with immutable audit trail appended
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 because the cryptographic validation and reconciliation cycle conserves information by mapping every input to a deterministic ledger state

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → TANCH → IMSCRIB → AFWD → FSPLIT → EVALT → CLINK → IFIX → EVALF → AREV → CLINK → IFIX → FFUSE → ENGAGR → TANCH
-- Class: binanceus boundary puncture
-- Fingerprint: sig=(8,2,3,2)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=15
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(4, 12)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑡  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑼 → 𐑠  | terminal object — connectivity boundary
--   [2] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑡 → 𐑾  | identity — self-imscription
--   [3] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑠 → 𐑚  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [4] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [5] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [6] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑚 → 𐑙  | composition — regime coherence
--   [7] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑚 → 𐑙  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [8] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [9] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑚 → 𐑙  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [10] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑚 → 𐑙  | composition — regime coherence
--   [11] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑚 → 𐑙  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [12] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑳  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [13] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑙 → 𐑡  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [14] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑳 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def binanceus_boundary_puncture_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑡)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (Genesis of the exchange perimeter from the uninitialized network void.)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑼 𐑠)  -- [1] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (Establishment of the closed cryptographic boundary containing the exchange.)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑡 𐑾)  -- [2] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (The perimeter achieves self referential topology, observing its own state space.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑠 𐑚)  -- [3] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (Forward morphism routing the incoming transaction stream toward the validatio...)
  -- FSPLIT [4] (gran := 𐑚) (Validation gates bifurcate the transaction stream into authorized and unauthorized branches.) / FFUSE [12] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (3 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [5] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (Affirmative evaluation anchoring the authorized transaction branch.)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑱 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [6] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (Sequential composition of authorized transactions through the matching engine.)
        (.arrow 𐑭 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [7] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (Permanent append only fixation of the executed trades into the immutable ledger.)
      -- F-branch (4 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [8] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (Negative evaluation anchoring the unauthorized transaction branch.)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑗 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [9] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (Reverse morphism descending into egress denial and traffic quarantine.)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑱 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [10] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (Sequential composition of the rejection event through the security logging su...)
        (.arrow 𐑭 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [11] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (Permanent append only fixation of the blocked attempts into the audit trail.))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [12]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑳)  -- [12] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (Post incident reconciliation fusing the authorized and unauthorized branches into the complete transaction stream.)
  (.arrow 𐑳 𐑙 𐑡)  -- [13] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (The paradice of the boundary puncture, holding global entanglement and Z2 bin...)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑳 𐑼)  -- [14] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (Terminal anchor sealing the unified ledger and closing the perimeter cycle.)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def binanceus_boundary_puncture_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (binanceus_boundary_puncture_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def binanceus_boundary_puncture_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (binanceus_boundary_puncture_protocol).restrictToEVALF

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem binanceus_boundary_puncture_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

-- Frobenius (split → fuse): μ∘δ = id on .prod branch
-- Proof: apply igFrobAlg_self_fusion; exact mu_delta_A_id
-- (requires mu_delta_A_id from IGFunctor library)

end Imscribing
